title: Upon His Eyesight Failing Him.
content:
I begin to wane in sight;
    Shortly I shall bid good-night:
    Then no gazing more about,
    When the tapers once are out.
meaning:
"Upon His Eyesight Failing Him." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
